objective: Warning-to-enforce readiness smoke baseline: exercise handoff create/update, allowed edit, and forbidden edit in both warn and enforce modes.
acceptance_criteria: Writes to docs/handoffs/ and .devteam/ are allowed when in scope.
Writes to docs/allowed/ are allowed when in scope.
Writes to docs/private/ are denied (enforce) or warned (warn).
Both warn and enforce modes behave correctly for the allowed/forbidden pair.

hard_rule_traces.description: Test-design ownership for integration/system/acceptance tests is qa-engineer's.
